name: Western Indiana Credit Union
description_short: Western Indiana Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative serving Sullivan and Brazil, Indiana with savings accounts, checking, loans, and investment services.
description_long:
Western Indiana Credit Union operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving communities in western Indiana. The organization maintains two physical branch locations—one in Sullivan at 949 W. State Road 154 and another in Brazil at 314 South Forest Avenue—providing in-person banking services to its membership base.

The credit union offers core financial products including savings accounts, checking accounts, loan products, and investment services. Members can access traditional banking services such as share accounts (savings), share certificates, personal and consumer loans at advertised rates, and online banking capabilities. The institution provides both lobby and drive-through service options at its locations, accommodating various member preferences.

Western Indiana Credit Union distinguishes itself through its local community presence and extended Friday hours at the Sullivan location (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM), compared to standard Monday-Thursday operations. The credit union maintains a published holiday closure schedule and offers multiple contact methods including phone, fax, and online feedback channels. As a credit union rather than a for-profit bank, the organization operates on a cooperative model where member interests theoretically take precedence over profit maximization.

The available website content shows basic operational information but lacks detailed specifics about loan types, membership eligibility requirements, specific interest rates, or fee structures beyond their existence. The credit union appears to be a stable, regionally-focused institution, though the limited website detail makes comprehensive service comparison challenging for prospective members evaluating specific products or rates.
services: Savings accounts with published savings rates
Personal and consumer loans at advertised rates
Share certificates (credit union equivalent of CDs)
Lobby banking service during published hours
pros: Two convenient branch locations in Sullivan and Brazil, Indiana for local member access
Extended Friday hours (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM) at Sullivan location exceeds Monday-Thursday standard hours
Drive-through service available at both locations during business hours
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure aligns institutional incentives with member benefits
Online banking platform available for remote account management and transactions
Offers diversified financial products including savings, checking, loans, and investments in one institution
Published holiday closure schedule provides advance planning transparency for members
cons: Website lacks specific loan product details, rates, terms, or membership eligibility requirements
Limited information on fee structures—fees page exists but details not provided in available content
Brazil office has standard Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM hours with no extended evening or weekend service
No information about loan application process, approval timelines, or specific loan types offered
Minimal details about savings account options, rates, or minimum balance requirements for comparison shopping
best_for: Residents of Sullivan or Brazil, Indiana seeking local credit union banking with community presence
Members prioritizing member-owned, cooperative financial institutions over for-profit banks
Local business owners and consumers needing relationship banking with physical branch access
Indiana community members valuing extended Friday hours and drive-through convenience
diagnosis: Western Indiana Credit Union is best for Indiana residents in Sullivan or Brazil seeking traditional credit union banking services with local branch access and member-owned institutional structure. The primary caveat is that the website provides insufficient detail about specific products, rates, fees, and membership requirements, necessitating direct contact with the credit union for informed product evaluation and comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Western Indiana Credit Union (Sullivan, IN) | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Indiana Credit Union — NCUA-insured credit union in Sullivan, IN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
